Meaning.Vi: Cú nắm tay (bàn tay cụp ngón lại thành hình拳头)
Meaning.En: A hand with the fingers curled tightly into the palm, especially as a gesture of anger or aggression.
Meaning.Example: He clenched his fist and glared at the opponent.

Situation.Vi: Thể hiện sự tức giận hoặc sẵn sàng đánh nhau.
Situation.En: Showing anger or readiness to fight.

Situation.Vi: Trong thể thao, ví dụ như quyền Anh, dùng nắm tay để đánh đối thủ.
Situation.En: In sports like boxing, using the fist to strike an opponent.

Meaning.En: To close the hand tightly so that the fingers are curled into the palm.
Meaning.Example: She fists her hands under the table to hide her nervousness.

Situation.Vi: Khi cố kìm chế cảm xúc như tức giận hoặc lo lắng.
Situation.En: When trying to suppress emotions such as anger or anxiety.
